programs.title: House Hunters Australia
programs.desc: Bridget wants a Hamptons-style cottage with a pool, while Paul seeks a home with character and a toolshed; will they find their dream home?

programs.title: House Hunters Australia
programs.desc: Matt seeks a workshop for his many projects, while Mel dreams of a spacious, character-filled home with guest accommodation; together, they search for a property that fits both visions.

programs.title: Renovation Aloha
programs.desc: With rotting floors, rats, and roaming chickens, Kamohai and Tristyn make an offer on the worst house they've ever seen. The deal falls out of escrow and returns at a bargain price, and now, they must transform this total disaster into a dream home.

programs.title: Bachelor Mansion Takeover
programs.desc: The nine remaining contestants get new teammates and a new challenge: renovating the iconic Rose Ceremony Room; new alliances are forged but the Golden Screwdriver will change the game in a shocking twist.

programs.title: Home Town
programs.desc: Ben and Erin help a family move from a Laurel suburb to the countryside and create a new home; the Napiers aim to design a place with ample outdoor space for the kids, along with a treehouse.

programs.title: Home Town
programs.desc: A couple lives in a house that once belonged to her grandmother, and with a large family that often visits, they're ready to make big upgrades; Ben and Erin add a much-needed additional bathroom as well as an outdoor kitchen.
